title: Nuget's War Axes
description:
This mod adds double axes or war axes to the game if you want to
use axes for combat.
body:
# INFORMATION
Hello this is my first mod that I published on there.
I had this idea a long time.
The axes should do more damage than the axe
and the cooldown is lowered too. I hope you enjoy
this mod!!!

# ITEMS
- Wooden War Axe
- Stone War Axe
- Iron War Axe
- Gold War Axe
- Diamond War Axe
- Netherite War Axe
- Every recipe for them
